title: ASMP CLI Response
description: CLI representation for the current state of a run. Served at GET /runs/{run_id}/cli. JSON only, snake_case. Clients and tools (e.g. CLRUN) MUST use this structure. Not part of the State Frame.

prompt.description: Short prompt line for this state (e.g. 'Choose an action').

hint.description: CLI-specific hint; can mirror or refine the State Frame hint for terminal users.

options.description: One entry per next_states item; for rendering as a select list.

label.description: Human-readable label for the option (e.g. 'Submit for audit').

keys.description: Optional suggested key sequence for TUI (e.g. 'enter', 'down enter').

input_hint.description: When state expects free-form input (e.g. 'Enter reason').

run_id.description: Run ID; use with base URL to form GET /runs/{run_id}/cli for viewing in browser.
